{properly, iteration or continuance; used only adverbially (with or without preposition), again, repeatedly, still, more}
{to fall, in a great variety of applications (intransitive or causative, literal or figurative)}

29.gl: {to know (properly, to ascertain by seeing); used in a great variety of senses, figuratively, literally, euphemistically and inferentially (including observation, care, recognition; and causatively, instruction, designat
that, used as relative conjunction, and especially (with a preposition) in adverbial phrases; also as preposition of
29.kj: [idiom] as, but, for(-asmuch [phrase]), [phrase] now, of, seeing, than, that, therefore, until, [phrase] what (-soever), when, which, whom, whose.

29.gl: {above, over, upon, or against (yet always in this last relation with a downward aspect) in a great variety of applications}
29.kj: about, against, concerning, for, (there-) fore, from, in, [idiom] more, of, (there-, up-) on, (in-) to, [phrase] why with.

29.gl: {properly, a part of; hence (prepositionally), from or out of}
29.kj: according, after, [phrase] because, [phrase] before, by, for, from, [idiom] him, [idiom] more than, (out) of, part, since, [idiom] these, to, upon, [phrase] when.

29.gl: {adverb or preposition, with (i.e. in conjunction with), in varied applications; specifically, equally with; often with prepositional prefix (and then usually unrepresented in English)}
{as far (or long, or much) as, whether of space (even unto) or time (during, while, until) or degree (equally with)}
29.kj: [idiom] and, at, for, (hither-) to, on till, (un-) to, until, within.

30.kj: [idiom] as, but, for(-asmuch [phrase]), [phrase] now, of, seeing, than, that, therefore, until, [phrase] what (-soever), when, which, whom, whose.

30.kj: about, against, concerning, for, (there-) fore, from, in, [idiom] more, of, (there-, up-) on, (in-) to, [phrase] why with.

30.gl: {properly, a part of; hence (prepositionally), from or out of}
30.kj: according, after, [phrase] because, [phrase] before, by, for, from, [idiom] him, [idiom] more than, (out) of, part, since, [idiom] these, to, upon, [phrase] when.

30.gl: {as far (or long, or much) as, whether of space (even unto) or time (during, while, until) or degree (equally with)}
30.kj: [idiom] and, at, for, (hither-) to, on till, (un-) to, until, within.

30.gl: {the sky (as aloft; the dual perhaps alluding to the visible arch in which the clouds move, as well as to the higher ether where the celestial bodies revolve)}
used in a peculiar sense, the body (probably for the (figuratively) idea of a hard rain)

31.gl: that, used as relative conjunction, and especially (with a preposition) in adverbial phrases; also as preposition of
31.kj: [idiom] as, but, for(-asmuch [phrase]), [phrase] now, of, seeing, than, that, therefore, until, [phrase] what (-soever), when, which, whom, whose.

31.gl: {above, over, upon, or against (yet always in this last relation with a downward aspect) in a great variety of applications}
31.kj: about, against, concerning, for, (there-) fore, from, in, [idiom] more, of, (there-, up-) on, (in-) to, [phrase] why with.

31.gl: {adverb or preposition, with (i.e. in conjunction with), in varied applications; specifically, equally with; often with prepositional prefix (and then usually unrepresented in English)}
{to kneel; by implication to bless God (as an act of adoration), and (vice-versa) man (as a benefit); also (by euphemism) to curse (God or the king, as treason)}
{the sky (as aloft; the dual perhaps alluding to the visible arch in which the clouds move, as well as to the higher ether where the celestial bodies revolve)}
{a termination (literally or figuratively); also (by implication) a portion; adverbially (with prepositional prefix) after}

32.gl: that, used as relative conjunction, and especially (with a preposition) in adverbial phrases; also as preposition of
32.kj: [idiom] as, but, for(-asmuch [phrase]), [phrase] now, of, seeing, than, that, therefore, until, [phrase] what (-soever), when, which, whom, whose.

32.gl: {properly, the whole; hence, all, any or every (in the singular only, but often in a plural sense)}
32.kj: all, any, + (forasmuch) as, + be-(for this) cause, every, + no (manner, -ne), + there (where) -fore, + though, what (where, who) -soever, (the) whole.

32.gl: {properly, interrogative what? (including how? why? when?); but also exclamation, what! (including how!), or indefinitely what}
32.kj: how great (mighty), that which, what(-soever), why.

32.gl: {the sky (as aloft; the dual perhaps alluding to the visible arch in which the clouds move, as well as to the higher ether where the celestial bodies revolve)}
{not (the simple or abs. negation); by implication, no;}
32.kj: or even, neither, no(-ne, -r), (can-) not, as nothing, without.

32.gl: properly, entity; used only as aparticle of affirmation, there is
32.kj: art thou, can, do ye, have, it be, there is (are), [idiom] we will not.

33.gl: {above, over, upon, or against (yet always in this last relation with a downward aspect) in a great variety of applications}
33.kj: about, against, concerning, for, (there-) fore, from, in, [idiom] more, of, (there-, up-) on, (in-) to, [phrase] why with.

33.dv: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7725 (שׁוּב), to come back;

33.kj: ask, desire, make (petition), pray, request, seek.

33.gl: {to add or augment (often adverbial, to continue to do a thing)}

34.gl: that, used as relative conjunction, and especially (with a preposition) in adverbial phrases; also as preposition of
34.kj: [idiom] as, but, for(-asmuch [phrase]), [phrase] now, of, seeing, than, that, therefore, until, [phrase] what (-soever), when, which, whom, whose.

34.gl: {properly, the whole; hence, all, any or every (in the singular only, but often in a plural sense)}
34.kj: all, any, + (forasmuch) as, + be-(for this) cause, every, + no (manner, -ne), + there (where) -fore, + though, what (where, who) -soever, (the) whole.

34.gl: {the sky (as aloft; the dual perhaps alluding to the visible arch in which the clouds move, as well as to the higher ether where the celestial bodies revolve)}
{to be high actively, to rise or raise (in various applications, literally or figuratively)}
{to depress or sink (expectation figuratively, to humiliate, intransitive or transitive)}
{to be able, literally (can, could) or morally (may, might)}
